pr.title: feat(aider): capture and emit token usage from aider output
pr.body:
Closes #132

## Summary
- Replaces `subprocess.run` with `subprocess.Popen` + two streaming threads so stderr can be parsed while aider runs
- Parses aider's `Tokens: X sent, Y received.` lines via regex, accumulates across all turns
- Emits `[runner] token_usage: prompt=X completion=Y total=Z` to stderr — the same format `sandbox.py` already intercepts and persists via `logger.set_token_usage()`
- Adds `tests/unit/test_aider_runner.py` with 9 tests covering regex matching and stream accumulation

## Test plan
- [ ] `python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_aider_runner.py -v` — 9 tests pass
- [ ] `python3 -m pytest tests/unit/ -q` — full suite (280 tests) green
- [ ] `ruff check .` — no lint errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: dvdthecoder
